steps.title: Recognize what the audience already knows
steps.content: The question directly specifies the audience is “already familiar with environmental DNA.” This is the defining context.

steps.title: Select the choice that presents the study appropriately
steps.content:
The correct answer presents the specific study—the researcher, method, location, and target species—without explaining eDNA.

The other choices define eDNA unnecessarily, while choice B discusses eDNA's capability in general rather than this particular study.

That is the correct answer.
